transitions.name: fetch_activity_data
transitions.description: Fetch activity data from the API.
transitions.end_state_description: Activity data has been successfully fetched.

process.name: fetch_activity_data_process
process.description: Process to fetch activity data from the Fakerest API.

transitions.name: process_activity_data
transitions.description: Process the fetched activity data to analyze patterns.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been fetched and is ready for processing.
transitions.end_state_description: Activity data has been successfully processed.

process.name: process_activity_data_process
process.description: Process to analyze and identify patterns from the fetched activity data.

transitions.name: generate_daily_report
transitions.description: Generate a daily report summarizing user activities.
transitions.start_state_description: Activity data has been processed and is ready for reporting.
transitions.end_state_description: Daily report has been successfully generated.

process.name: generate_daily_report_process
process.description: Process to create a daily report based on the processed activity data.

transitions.name: send_report
transitions.description: Send the generated report to admin via email.
transitions.start_state_description: Daily report has been generated and is ready to be sent.
transitions.end_state_description: Report has been successfully sent to admin.

process.name: send_report_process
process.description: Process to send the daily report to the configured admin email.
